title: membership — realtime broadcast channels
description: Five broadcast channels: tenant / branch / athlete / user + a per-membership channel for live pass-usage widgets during check-in.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.memberships
channels.description: Tenant-wide membership lifecycle stream. Powers admin dashboards + finance widgets.

channels.name: branch.{branchId}.memberships
channels.description: Branch-scoped stream — powers branch-manager real-time views.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `memberships.viewAny` scoped to branch OR branch_manager on branch)

channels.name: athlete.{athleteId}.memberships
channels.description: Per-athlete lifecycle stream. Powers the athlete detail page's membership indicator.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `memberships.view` scoped to athlete OR guardian OR self)

channels.name: user.{userId}.memberships
channels.description: Per-user stream — powers the /me/memberships live widget for guardians + adult athletes. Filters events where athlete.user_id = userId OR guardian.user_id = userId.

channels.name: membership.{membershipId}.passes
channels.description: Per-membership pass stream. Fires each PassIssued / PassConsumed / PassExpired / PassRefunded so kiosk + coach UIs see live pass-count updates during check-in.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `passes.view.own` scoped to membership OR permission `passes.viewAny` on tenant)
